title: Committee report required
doc_html:
Rule 8.14.  Committee report required

A.  No bill or joint resolution originating in the House shall be engrossed and passed to third reading unless it has been reported by a committee.

B.  No Senate bill or joint resolution shall be passed to its third reading unless it has been reported by a committee.

Mason's Manual:  Sec. 111(15)

HR 3, 1973; HR 34, 1997, eff. May 6, 1997; HR 4, 2006 2nd Ex. Sess., eff. Dec. 13, 2006.
